pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.2 to align with JDK 21 support and modern Spring ecosystem.
Update the project's target Java version property from 11 to 21.
Upgrade SpotBugs Maven plugin to a version compatible with newer JDKs and build tools.
Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21 bytecode.

.gitignore.general_idea: Added standard patterns to ignore compiled classes, logs, and archive files generated by the JVM.
Added patterns to ignore JVM crash and replay files.
Added pattern to ignore the 'out' directory, commonly used by IDEs or build tools.
Removed the specific HELP.md file from the ignore list.
Removed ignore patterns specific to Spring Tool Suite (STS) and Eclipse.
Removed ignore patterns specific to NetBeans IDE.
Removed ignore patterns specific to VS Code.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Removed the deprecated 'version' field from docker-compose.yml as it is no longer required in modern Compose specifications.
Upgraded the stats-db service image from PostgreSQL 14 Alpine to PostgreSQL 16.1.
docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Changed 'image: postgres:14-alpine' to 'image: postgres:16.1' for stats-db

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Upgraded the ewm-db service image from PostgreSQL 14 Alpine to PostgreSQL 16.1.
docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Changed 'image: postgres:14-alpine' to 'image: postgres:16.1' for ewm-db

ewm-main-service-spec.json.general_idea: Updated the OpenAPI info section to include a description and change the title to Russian.
ewm-main-service-spec.json.human_impl: "description": "Documentation \"Explore With Me\" API v1.0", "title": "\"Explore With Me\" API сервер"

ewm-main-service-spec.json.general_idea: Added minimum value constraint of 0 to the 'from' pagination parameter across multiple endpoints.
Added length restrictions (min 1, max 7000) to the 'text' search parameter.
Added length restrictions (min 1, max 50) to the category name field in request and response schemas.
Added length restrictions (min 1, max 50) to the compilation title field in request and response schemas.
Added length restrictions (min 6, max 254) to the user email field.
Added length restrictions (min 2, max 250) to the user name field.
